message:
ci: add Node.js/Bun baselines to Node.js Core API tests

Updated Node.js Core API compatibility tests to compare 3 runtimes:
- **EdgeBox**: Compiled to WASM/AOT (includes compilation time)
- **Bun**: Compiled to binary with \`bun build --compile\` (apples-to-apples with EdgeBox)
- **Node.js**: Direct execution (baseline, should be 100%)

This provides context for EdgeBox's Node.js API compatibility:
- Node.js baseline shows expected behavior (100% pass)
- Bun shows another compiled runtime for comparison
- EdgeBox shows current compatibility status

Updated test script to support compilation mode for fair Bun comparison.
Updated CI summary to show all 3 runtimes side-by-side with clear notes
about compilation vs direct execution.

Currently only testing Buffer module - will expand to fs, path, crypto.

files.patch:
@@ -64,16 +64,38 @@ jobs:
           echo "Test files downloaded:"
           find test/parallel -name "*.js" | wc -l
 
-      - name: Run Node.js Core Tests - Buffer
-        id: test-buffer
+      - name: Run Node.js Core Tests - Buffer (EdgeBox)
+        id: test-buffer-edgebox
         run: |
           ./scripts/run-node-core-tests.sh node-core buffer
           passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
           failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
           skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          echo "buffer_passed=$passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "buffer_failed=$failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "buffer_skipped=$skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "edgebox_passed=$passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "edgebox_failed=$failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "edgebox_skipped=$skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+      - name: Run Node.js Core Tests - Buffer (Bun compiled)
+        id: test-buffer-bun
+        run: |
+          ./scripts/run-node-core-tests-native.sh bun buffer compile
+          passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-bun-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-bun-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-bun-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          echo "bun_passed=$passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "bun_failed=$failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "bun_skipped=$skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+      - name: Run Node.js Core Tests - Buffer (Node.js direct)
+        id: test-buffer-node
+        run: |
+          ./scripts/run-node-core-tests-native.sh node buffer direct
+          passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-node-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-node-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-node-buffer.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          echo "node_passed=$passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "node_failed=$failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "node_skipped=$skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
       - name: Run Node.js Core Tests - File System
         id: test-fs
@@ -110,24 +132,48 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Generate Summary
         run: |
-          echo "# Node.js Core API Compatibility" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "# Node.js Core API Compatibility - All Runtimes" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "Testing against official Node.js test suite from https://github.com/nodejs/node" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "Testing Node.js API compatibility across runtimes:" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "- **EdgeBox**: Compiled to WASM/AOT (edgeboxc → edgebox)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "- **Bun**: Compiled to standalone binary (\`bun build --compile\`)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "- **Node.js**: Direct execution (no compilation)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "**Note:** EdgeBox and Bun include compilation time. Node.js baseline shows expected 100% pass rate." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
-          echo "## Results by Module" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "## Buffer Module Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Module | Passed | Failed | Skipped | Pass Rate |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "|--------|--------|--------|---------|-----------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Runtime | Passed | Failed | Pass Rate |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "|---------|--------|--------|-----------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
-          # Buffer
-          buffer_total=$((${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_failed }}))
-          if [ $buffer_total -gt 0 ]; then
-            buffer_rate=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", (${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_passed }} / $buffer_total) * 100}")
+          # EdgeBox Buffer
+          edgebox_buffer_total=$((${{ steps.test-buffer-edgebox.outputs.edgebox_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-buffer-edgebox.outputs.edgebox_failed }}))
+          if [ $edgebox_buffer_total -gt 0 ]; then
+            edgebox_buffer_rate=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", (${{ steps.test-buffer-edgebox.outputs.edgebox_passed }} / $edgebox_buffer_total) * 100}")
           else
-            buffer_rate="N/A"
+            edgebox_buffer_rate="N/A"
           fi
-          echo "| Buffer | ${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_passed }} | ${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_failed }} | ${{ steps.test-buffer.outputs.buffer_skipped }} | $buffer_rate |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| EdgeBox (compiled) | ${{ steps.test-buffer-edgebox.outputs.edgebox_passed }} | ${{ steps.test-buffer-edgebox.outputs.edgebox_failed }} | $edgebox_buffer_rate |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+          # Bun Buffer
+          bun_buffer_total=$((${{ steps.test-buffer-bun.outputs.bun_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-buffer-bun.outputs.bun_failed }}))
+          if [ $bun_buffer_total -gt 0 ]; then
+            bun_buffer_rate=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", (${{ steps.test-buffer-bun.outputs.bun_passed }} / $bun_buffer_total) * 100}")
+          else
+            bun_buffer_rate="N/A"
+          fi
+          echo "| Bun (compiled) | ${{ steps.test-buffer-bun.outputs.bun_passed }} | ${{ steps.test-buffer-bun.outputs.bun_failed }} | $bun_buffer_rate |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+          # Node.js Buffer
+          node_buffer_total=$((${{ steps.test-buffer-node.outputs.node_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-buffer-node.outputs.node_failed }}))
+          if [ $node_buffer_total -gt 0 ]; then
+            node_buffer_rate=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", (${{ steps.test-buffer-node.outputs.node_passed }} / $node_buffer_total) * 100}")
+          else
+            node_buffer_rate="N/A"
+          fi
+          echo "| Node.js (direct) | ${{ steps.test-buffer-node.outputs.node_passed }} | ${{ steps.test-buffer-node.outputs.node_failed }} | $node_buffer_rate |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
           # File System
           fs_total=$((${{ steps.test-fs.outputs.fs_passed }} + ${{ steps.test-fs.outputs.fs_failed }}))

@@ -1,21 +1,23 @@
 #!/bin/bash
 # Run Node.js Core Tests on Native Runtimes (Node.js/Bun)
-# Usage: ./scripts/run-node-core-tests-native.sh <engine> <module>
+# Usage: ./scripts/run-node-core-tests-native.sh <engine> <module> [mode]
 #   engine: node or bun
 #   module: buffer, fs, path, crypto, or all
+#   mode: direct (default) or compile (for bun build --compile)
 
 set -e
 
 ENGINE="${1:-node}"
 MODULE="${2:-all}"
+MODE="${3:-direct}"  # 'direct' or 'compile'
 RESULTS_FILE="node-test-results-${ENGINE}-${MODULE}.txt"
 
 # Counters
 PASSED=0
 FAILED=0
 SKIPPED=0
 
-echo "=== Node.js Core Tests for $ENGINE ===" > "$RESULTS_FILE"
+echo "=== Node.js Core Tests for $ENGINE (mode: $MODE) ===" > "$RESULTS_FILE"
 echo "Module: $MODULE" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
 echo "Started: $(date)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
 echo "" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
@@ -24,16 +26,30 @@ echo "" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
 run_test() {
     local test_name="$1"
     local test_code="$2"
-    
+
     # Create temp test file
     local test_file="/tmp/node-test-${test_name}.js"
     echo "$test_code" > "$test_file"
-    
-    # Run with the specified engine
+
     local output
     local exit_code=0
-    output=$(timeout 10s $ENGINE "$test_file" 2>&1) || exit_code=$?
-    
+
+    if [ "$MODE" = "compile" ] && [ "$ENGINE" = "bun" ]; then
+        # Bun: compile to binary then run
+        local binary_file="/tmp/node-test-${test_name}"
+        if ! bun build --compile "$test_file" --outfile "$binary_file" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
+            echo "✗ $test_name (compile failed)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
+            FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
+            rm -f "$test_file" "$binary_file"
+            return
+        fi
+        output=$(timeout 10s "$binary_file" 2>&1) || exit_code=$?
+        rm -f "$binary_file"
+    else
+        # Direct execution (Node.js or Bun direct mode)
+        output=$(timeout 10s $ENGINE "$test_file" 2>&1) || exit_code=$?
+    fi
+
     if echo "$output" | grep -q "^SKIP:"; then
         echo "○ $test_name (skipped)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
         SKIPPED=$((SKIPPED + 1))
@@ -48,7 +64,7 @@ run_test() {
         echo "  Output: $(echo "$output" | head -2)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
         FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
     fi
-    
+
     # Cleanup
     rm -f "$test_file"
 }
